description_long: This object is a large, rectangular electronic device with a robust metal housing and a prominent control panel on its front face. The control panel features multiple physical buttons, rotary dials, and switches, as well as several display areas, likely for monitoring or adjusting settings. The top and sides are plain, metallic, and industrial in appearance, while the back is simple with a few ports or connectors. The front panel is angled outward, making the controls and displays easily accessible. The overall design suggests it is a specialized piece of equipment, possibly for audio, video, or industrial control, intended for stationary use in an urban environment such as a control room, studio, or technical facility.
description: A large, metallic electronic device with an angled control panel featuring buttons, dials, and display areas, designed for stationary use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the device and the outward-angled control panel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the detailed control panel with buttons, dials, and display sections.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and angled control panel, with some visible connectors.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a plain metallic surface with a few ports or connectors.
